{{CargoOrgan
|name=Ultimate Brain
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10895
|idx=106
|description=The organ is obtained by infusing embryonic stem cells with the ultimate bionic part essence, having a leap in performance.
|skill=
|hp=3490
|def=230
|atk=214
|rush=277
|gene1=Water DMG +120
|gene2=Water RES +120
|gene3=Against main species, enemy CRIT -20%
|gene4=Against main species, enemy HIT -12%
|gene5=Per Orange Coating crafted, gain +1 by +10%
|gene6=All FTH Bionic Parts, ELMT RES +2%
|gene7=Water DMG +6% (Awakened)
|}}
